summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of MealTalks landing page completed successfully. All visual elements, phone mockups, feature icons, gradients, shadows, and responsive design tested thoroughly.
passed_tests: Header renders with 'Meal talks' logo and 'Launch app' button
Hero section shows actual phone mockup images with proper tilt angles (-5deg, 6deg) and drop shadows
Features section shows 6 feature cards with correct icons: Camera, Clock, Target, Settings, BarChart3, HelpCircle
Feature cards have proper shadow styling (shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(61,40,27,0.06)])
Habits section shows actual phone mockup images (Day Streak + Plan screen)
AI section shows actual AI chat phone mockup image
Testimonial section has correct orange gradient (from-[#FFB780] via-[#FF9E6B] to-[#FF8C5C])
Footer with all Company and Help links renders correctly
All 5 phone mockup images load successfully with proper drop shadows
Page is responsive on mobile (390x844), tablet (768x1024), desktop (1920x1080)
Hover effects work on feature cards (shadow + translate) and buttons (color change)
All buttons are clickable and not disabled
Phone mockup transform effects (rotation angles) work correctly
All sections visible and accessible via scrolling
